name: AI Addendum
description: Supplemental terms governing the use of AI/ML features within a SaaS product. Covers AI service usage restrictions, model training consent, IP ownership of inputs/outputs, and disclaimers about AI-generated content inaccuracies.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of Protected Health Information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate. Covers PHI obligations, safeguards, breach notification, and individual rights.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard SaaS subscription agreement covering cloud service access and use rights, user account responsibilities, customer content handling, ML/AI data usage, restrictions, privacy, security, fees, IP, and indemnification.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-access beta partnerships where a partner gets pre-release product access in exchange for providing structured feedback to help the provider develop and improve the product. Covers feedback rights, fees, confidentiality, and IP.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: GDPR-focused agreement governing the processing of personal data by a provider on behalf of a customer. Covers processor/subprocessor relationships, data subject rights, security obligations, international data transfers, and audit rights.

name: Mutual NDA — Standard Terms
description: The standard terms body of a mutual non-disclosure agreement. Covers the definition of confidential information, permitted use and disclosure, protection obligations, required disclosures, return/destruction of information, and term.

name: Mutual NDA — Cover Page
description: The fillable cover page component of the Mutual NDA, with labeled fields for Purpose, Effective Date, MNDA Term, and party details. References and incorporates the Standard Terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Agreement governing a commercial partnership between two companies. Covers mutual obligations, feedback rights, revenue sharing or referral arrangements, confidentiality, IP ownership, and general terms.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Agreement for a time-limited product evaluation (pilot/trial). Grants the customer access to the product solely for internal evaluation purposes during a defined pilot period, typically at no cost or reduced cost, with no warranties.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Agreement governing the delivery of professional/consulting services. Covers SOW-based service delivery, customer cooperation obligations, fees and invoicing, IP ownership of deliverables, confidentiality, and warranties.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Agreement defining cloud service uptime commitments and remedies. Covers target uptime calculation methodology, scheduled maintenance exclusions, downtime definitions, and service credits for SLA breaches.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for on-premise/installed software licensing. Grants a limited, non-exclusive, non-sublicensable license to install and use software on customer-controlled systems, covering user accounts, restrictions, fees, IP, warranties, and indemnification.
